failure_movement.justification: Unknown cluster correctly predicted to shrink by 2-4 (actual -3). Empty correctly predicted to shrink slightly (actual -2). But 'wrong' cluster doubling from 6 to 12 (+6) was completely missed with no prediction. Correct cluster also dropped -1. Partial credit for two correct calls, penalized for missing the large wrong-cluster regression.

trace_movement.justification: Prompt tokens dropped 169 tokens (11%), prediction said 'slightly' — directionally right but underestimated magnitude. Completion tokens: prediction claimed 60-350 range with no 512-spike; actual had 7@512 and 16>350 (vs iter009's 8@512 and 12>350), so >350 rose slightly. 'Variable-length hits' claim is unverifiable from raw data. Partial credit across claims.

side_effects.justification: Predicted regression risk on list/objective questions if 200-char floor too small — single-session-preference hit 0% and wrong cluster doubled (+6), partially validating this risk. Correctly predicted no spike in 512-completions (7 vs 8 in iter009). Did not flag the large wrong-cluster regression as a primary risk. Partial credit.
